no: Berserk characters are immune as in an unmodded game.Install Purist Demiliches after SCS.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Both modify demilich.cre and hldemi.cre. Polylich overhauls abilities/stats. Lichdom adds Lich Dust item. Compatible — patch different parts of the same files.

sum: Overhauls demiliches to be more faithful to PnP rules, restoring abilities like soul trapping and cursing while adding proper vulnerabilities to specific spells.

co.n: Trap the Soul: Preventable by MR, ignores berserk (recommended)
co.tp2n: Demilich Trap the Soul is preventable by magic resistance, ignores berserk (recommended)

co.n: Trap the Soul: Bypasses MR, berserk immune (vanilla)
co.tp2n: Demilich Trap the Soul bypasses magic resistance, berserk characters are immune (as in the unmodded game)

co.n: Resilient: Yes, HLA parties kill them too fast
co.tp2n: Yes, they die far too quickly to parties using High Level Abilities
co.scn: Do you want more resilient Demiliches?

co.n: Resilient: Max HP per hit die only (no power creep)
co.tp2n: Just give them maximum hp per hit die (like most monsters), anything else is power creep
co.scn: Do you want more resilient Demiliches?

advisories.reason: Both overhaul demilich behavior. May produce unexpected interactions
